conveyor: The image shows three straight parallel conveyor belts with small 3D objects on them.
The scene shows small 3D objects arranged on three straight conveyor lanes.
A 3D conveyor setup is shown with three parallel belts carrying objects.
The picture shows three separate straight conveyor belts with objects on the belts.
The visual shows a three-lane conveyor with small objects on each lane.

object_type_belt_count: How many {target_object_plural} are on the {lane_label} belt?
Count the {target_object_plural} on the {lane_label} belt. How many are there?
Looking only at the {lane_label} belt, how many {target_object_plural} are visible?
On the {lane_label} conveyor belt, how many {target_object_plural} are there?
What is the number of {target_object_plural} on the {lane_label} belt?
color_belt_count: How many {target_color_label} objects are on the {lane_label} belt?
Count the {target_color_label} objects on the {lane_label} belt. How many are there?
Looking only at the {lane_label} belt, how many objects are {target_color_label}?
On the {lane_label} conveyor belt, how many {target_color_label} objects are there?
What is the number of {target_color_label} objects on the {lane_label} belt?
color_type_belt_count: How many {target_color_label} {target_object_plural} are on the {lane_label} belt?
Count the {target_color_label} {target_object_plural} on the {lane_label} belt. How many are there?
Looking only at the {lane_label} belt, how many {target_color_label} {target_object_plural} are visible?
On the {lane_label} conveyor belt, how many {target_color_label} {target_object_plural} are there?
What is the number of {target_color_label} {target_object_plural} on the {lane_label} belt?
belt_total_count: How many objects are on the {lane_label} belt?
Count all objects on the {lane_label} belt. How many are there?
Looking only at the {lane_label} belt, how many objects are visible?
On the {lane_label} conveyor belt, how many objects are there?
What is the total number of objects on the {lane_label} belt?
object_count_sum: What is the sum of the number of {target_object_plural} on the {first_lane_label} belt and the number of {target_object_plural} on the {second_lane_label} belt?
Add the count of {target_object_plural} on the {first_lane_label} belt to the count of {target_object_plural} on the {second_lane_label} belt. What is the sum?
Count the {target_object_plural} on the {first_lane_label} belt and on the {second_lane_label} belt, then add the two counts. What is the result?
How many {target_object_plural} are there in total on the {first_lane_label} and {second_lane_label} belts?
Find the total count of {target_object_plural} across the {first_lane_label} belt and the {second_lane_label} belt.
object_count_difference: What is the difference between the number of {target_object_plural} on the {first_lane_label} belt and the number on the {second_lane_label} belt?
Count the {target_object_plural} on the {first_lane_label} belt and on the {second_lane_label} belt. What is the absolute difference?
Subtract the smaller {target_object_plural} count from the larger one for the {first_lane_label} and {second_lane_label} belts. What is the difference?
What is the absolute difference between the {target_object_plural} counts on the {first_lane_label} and {second_lane_label} belts?
Find the absolute difference in {target_object_plural} counts between the {first_lane_label} belt and the {second_lane_label} belt.
color_ordered_pair_count: On the {lane_label} belt, how many neighboring {first_target_color_label} objects are immediately followed by {second_target_color_label} objects?
Following the order of the {lane_label} belt, count each {first_target_color_label} object immediately followed by a {second_target_color_label} object. How many pairs are there?
How many adjacent ordered pairs on the {lane_label} belt go from a {first_target_color_label} object to a {second_target_color_label} object?
Count the neighboring pairs on the {lane_label} belt where {first_target_color_label} comes immediately before {second_target_color_label}.
On the {lane_label} conveyor, what is the count of adjacent {first_target_color_label} then {second_target_color_label} object pairs?
object_ordered_pair_count: On the {lane_label} belt, how many neighboring {first_target_object_plural} are immediately followed by {second_target_object_plural}?
Following the order of the {lane_label} belt, count each {first_target_object_plural} immediately followed by {second_target_object_plural}. How many pairs are there?
How many adjacent ordered pairs on the {lane_label} belt go from {first_target_object_plural} to {second_target_object_plural}?
Count the neighboring pairs on the {lane_label} belt where {first_target_object_plural} come immediately before {second_target_object_plural}.
On the {lane_label} conveyor, what is the count of adjacent {first_target_object_plural} then {second_target_object_plural} pairs?
between_object_anchors_count: On the {lane_label} belt, how many objects are between the marked {start_anchor_object_name} {start_anchor_label} and the marked {end_anchor_object_name} {end_anchor_label}?
Count the objects strictly between marked object {start_anchor_label} and marked object {end_anchor_label} on the {lane_label} belt. How many are there?
Looking only at the {lane_label} belt, how many objects lie between the marked {start_anchor_object_name} {start_anchor_label} and the marked {end_anchor_object_name} {end_anchor_label}?
On the {lane_label} conveyor, count the objects after marked object {start_anchor_label} and before marked object {end_anchor_label}. What is the count?
How many objects on the {lane_label} belt are strictly between the two marked anchor objects {start_anchor_label} and {end_anchor_label}?
color_transfer_total_count: Suppose all {target_color_label} objects on the {source_lane_label} belt are moved to the {destination_lane_label} belt. How many objects would be on the {destination_lane_label} belt?
If every {target_color_label} object from the {source_lane_label} belt moved onto the {destination_lane_label} belt, what would the total object count on the {destination_lane_label} belt be?
Move all {target_color_label} objects from the {source_lane_label} belt to the {destination_lane_label} belt. How many objects are then on the {destination_lane_label} belt?
After transferring the {target_color_label} objects on the {source_lane_label} belt to the {destination_lane_label} belt, how many objects would the {destination_lane_label} belt have?
What is the new total on the {destination_lane_label} belt if all {target_color_label} objects from the {source_lane_label} belt are moved there?
object_transfer_total_count: Suppose all {target_object_plural} on the {source_lane_label} belt are moved to the {destination_lane_label} belt. How many objects would be on the {destination_lane_label} belt?
If every {target_object_plural} from the {source_lane_label} belt moved onto the {destination_lane_label} belt, what would the total object count on the {destination_lane_label} belt be?
Move all {target_object_plural} from the {source_lane_label} belt to the {destination_lane_label} belt. How many objects are then on the {destination_lane_label} belt?
After transferring the {target_object_plural} on the {source_lane_label} belt to the {destination_lane_label} belt, how many objects would the {destination_lane_label} belt have?
What is the new total on the {destination_lane_label} belt if all {target_object_plural} from the {source_lane_label} belt are moved there?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:object_type_belt_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:object_type_belt_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted object on the requested belt

query:color_belt_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:color_belt_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted colored object on the requested belt

query:color_type_belt_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:color_type_belt_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted object matching both the requested color and object type on the requested belt

query:belt_total_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:belt_total_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted object on the requested belt

query:object_count_sum.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed count as an integer
query:object_count_sum.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with one key for each requested lane, named by lane position such as "top_objects" or "left_objects"; each value is an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes around the counted objects of the requested type for that lane

query:object_count_difference.answer_hint: set "answer" to the computed count as an integer
query:object_count_difference.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with one key for each requested lane, named by lane position such as "top_objects" or "left_objects"; each value is an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes around the counted objects of the requested type for that lane

query:color_ordered_pair_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:color_ordered_pair_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one pixel-space segment [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] per counted adjacent ordered pair, where each endpoint is an [x, y] pixel point at an object center; the segment starts at the first object and ends at the second object

query:object_ordered_pair_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:object_ordered_pair_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one pixel-space segment [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] per counted adjacent ordered pair, where each endpoint is an [x, y] pixel point at an object center; the segment starts at the first object and ends at the second object

query:between_object_anchors_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:between_object_anchors_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted object between the marked anchors; do not include the marked anchor objects

query:color_transfer_total_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the resulting count as an integer
query:color_transfer_total_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_moved_objects" and "destination_existing_objects"; each value is an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes around the corresponding objects before the move

query:object_transfer_total_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the resulting count as an integer
query:object_transfer_total_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "source_moved_objects" and "destination_existing_objects"; each value is an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes around the corresponding objects before the move
